subject: An elf-eared figure in vest and white shirt raises both hands in a defensive gesture while two larger, menacing figures close in from behind in a stone alley or ruin
description: A slender figure with visible pointed ears stands in a low crouch on stone steps, both hands raised open-palmed in a defensive or placating gesture, yellow boots planted wide. The figure wears a vest with embroidered detail over a white shirt. Behind and to the right, two larger, rougher-looking humanoid figures loom — one with sharp claws visible, both radiating threat. The setting is a cramped stone stairway or rubble alley under pale blue urban light. A small circular object rests on the foreground step, possibly a dropped token or artifact. The palette is cool blue-grey with warm tan on the central figure.
foreground: elf-eared figure with hands raised defensively on stone steps, small object on ground
background: stone alley ruin, two menacing figures crowding in, urban blue light
emotion: fear and panic — hands raised, wide stance, surrounded
